records.question: Which companies named PetroChina are headquartered in China, operate in Oil and gas, have a market value of exactly 294.7, rank at most 7, assets no more than 304.7 billion, sales of at least 310.1 billion, and profits at most 20.6 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT company.company_id FROM company
WHERE company.headquarters = 'China' AND company.market_value = 294.7 AND company.rank <= 7 AND company.assets_billion <= 304.7 AND company.company = 'PetroChina' AND company.sales_billion >= 310.1 AND company.main_industry = 'Oil and gas' AND company.profits_billion <= 20.6
records.pred_sql: SELECT Company_ID FROM company WHERE Headquarters = 'China' AND Market_Value = 294.7 AND Rank <= 7 AND Assets_billion <= 304.7 AND Company = 'PetroChina' AND Sales_billion >= 310.1 AND Main_Industry = 'Oil and gas' AND Profits_billion <= 20.6

records.question: Which companies headquartered in the USA have a rank of at most 8?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT company.company_id FROM company
WHERE company.headquarters = 'USA' AND company.rank <= 8
records.pred_sql: SELECT Company_ID FROM company WHERE Headquarters = 'USA' AND Rank <= 8

records.question: Which companies named PetroChina in the Oil and gas industry have assets of exactly 304.7 billion and profits of at least 20.6 billion, with gas stations opened in 2004 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT company.company_id FROM company
JOIN station_company ON company.company_id = station_company.company_id
JOIN gas_station ON station_company.station_id = gas_station.station_id
WHERE company.profits_billion >= 20.6 AND company.main_industry = 'Oil and gas' AND company.company = 'PetroChina' AND company.assets_billion = 304.7 AND gas_station.open_year <= 2004
records.pred_sql:
SELECT company.Company_ID
FROM company
JOIN station_company ON company.Company_ID = station_company.Company_ID
JOIN gas_station ON station_company.Station_ID = gas_station.Station_ID
WHERE company.Profits_billion >= 20.6
  AND company.Main_Industry = 'Oil and gas'
  AND company.Company = 'PetroChina'
  AND company.Assets_billion = 304.7
  AND gas_station.Open_Year <= 2004
GROUP BY company.Company_ID

records.question: Which companies in the Oil and gas industry are named PetroChina, headquartered in China, with sales exactly 310.1 billion and profits exactly 20.6 billion?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT company.company_id FROM company
WHERE company.main_industry = 'Oil and gas' AND company.company = 'PetroChina' AND company.headquarters = 'China' AND company.sales_billion = 310.1 AND company.profits_billion = 20.6
records.pred_sql: SELECT Company_ID FROM company WHERE Main_Industry = 'Oil and gas' AND Company = 'PetroChina' AND Headquarters = 'China' AND Sales_billion = 310.1 AND Profits_billion = 20.6

records.question: What companies named ExxonMobil have a market value of at least 407.4 and a rank of the year at most 13?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT company.company_id FROM company
JOIN station_company ON company.company_id = station_company.company_id
WHERE company.company = 'ExxonMobil' AND station_company.rank_of_the_year <= 13 AND company.market_value >= 407.4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT company.Company_ID
FROM company
JOIN station_company ON company.Company_ID = station_company.Company_ID
WHERE company.Company = 'ExxonMobil'
  AND company.Market_Value >= 407.4
  AND station_company.Rank_of_the_Year <= 13

records.question: Which companies headquartered in the UK have assets of at most 292.5 billion, sales no more than 375.5 billion, profits exactly 25.7 billion, and market value exactly 147.4 billion, with gas stations managed by Luke Rowe located on Maindy Ave and opened in 2008 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT company.company_id FROM company
JOIN station_company ON company.company_id = station_company.company_id
JOIN gas_station ON station_company.station_id = gas_station.station_id
WHERE company.assets_billion <= 292.5 AND gas_station.manager_name = 'Luke Rowe' AND gas_station.location = 'Maindy Ave' AND company.sales_billion <= 375.5 AND company.headquarters = 'UK' AND gas_station.open_year <= 2008 AND company.profits_billion = 25.7 AND company.market_value = 147.4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT company.Company_ID
FROM company
JOIN station_company ON company.Company_ID = station_company.Company_ID
JOIN gas_station ON station_company.Station_ID = gas_station.Station_ID
WHERE company.Assets_billion <= 292.5
  AND company.Sales_billion <= 375.5
  AND company.Headquarters = 'UK'
  AND company.Profits_billion = 25.7
  AND company.Market_Value = 147.4
  AND gas_station.Manager_Name = 'Luke Rowe'
  AND gas_station.Location = 'Maindy Ave'
  AND gas_station.Open_Year <= 2008

records.question: Which companies named Petrobras are headquartered in Brazil, operate in Oil and gas, have a rank of 10, sales of 145.9 billion, profits of at least 20.1 billion, a market value at most 180.0 billion, and a station rank of the year exactly 4?

WHERE company.main_industry = 'Oil and gas' AND company.company = 'Petrobras' AND station_company.rank_of_the_year = 4 AND company.profits_billion >= 20.1 AND company.market_value <= 180.0 AND company.sales_billion = 145.9 AND company.rank = 10 AND company.headquarters = 'Brazil'
